segments.text: MAN: Good morning, Kenton Festival box office.
segments.translation: 男士：早上好，这里是Kenton节假日售票处。

segments.text: How can I help you?
segments.translation: 请问有什么可以帮到您？

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, good morning.
segments.translation: 女士：早上好。

segments.text: I'm coming to Kenton for a few days' holiday next month, and a friend told me there's a festival.
segments.translation: 下个月我会去Kenton度几天假，有个朋友告诉我那里有个节日。

segments.text: She gave me this number to find out about it.
segments.translation: 她给了我这个号码让我自己来问清楚。

segments.text: MAN: That's right, the festival begins on the 16th of May and goes on till the 19th.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，该节日从5月16号开始，持续到19号。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, that's great.
segments.translation: 女士：啊，太棒了。

segments.text: I'll be there from the 15th till the 19th.
segments.translation: 我会在那从15号待到19号。

segments.text: So could you tell me the programme, please?
segments.translation: 请你告诉我一下具体有什么节目。

segments.text: MAN: Well, on the first day, there's the opening ceremony, in the town centre.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，第一天在市中心有个开幕式。

segments.text: People start gathering around 2 o'clock, to get a good place to see from, and the events will start at 2.45, and finish about 5.30.
segments.translation: 为了找到一个看节目的好位置，人们两点左右就开始聚集，开幕式2：45开始，5：30左右结束。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK, thanks. I'll make sure I get there early to get a good spot.
segments.translation: 女士：好的，谢谢。我会确保早点到那找个好位置的。

segments.text: MAN: The festival will be officially opened by the mayor.
segments.translation: 男士：节日将由市长宣布正式开始。

segments.text: He'll just speak for a few minutes, welcoming everyone to the festival.
segments.translation: 他会发表几分钟的讲话，欢迎大家来参与这个节日。

segments.text: All the town councillors will be there, and of course lots of other people.
segments.translation: 所有的市议员都会出席，当然也还有很多别的人。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right.
segments.translation: 女士：好。

segments.text: MAN: Then there'll be a performance by a band.
segments.translation: 男士：然后会有一个乐队的表演。

segments.text: Most years we have a children's choir, but this year the local army cadets offered to perform, and they're very good.
segments.translation: 大多数年份都有儿童合唱，但今年本地军校学员主动要来表演，他们非常棒。

segments.text: WOMAN: Uhuh.
segments.translation: 女士：哦，是吗？

segments.text: MAN: After that, a community group from the town will perform a play they've written themselves, just a short one.
segments.translation: 男士：在那之后，本地的一个社区团体将表演一出他们自己写的短剧。

segments.text: It's about Helen Tungate.
segments.translation: 短剧是关于 Helen Tungate的。

segments.text: I don't know if you've heard of her?
segments.translation: 我不知道您是否听说过她。

segments.text: WOMAN: I certainly have. She was a scientist years ago.
segments.translation: 女士：我当然听过。她很多年前是位科学家。

segments.text: MAN: That's right. She was born in Kenton exactly 100 years ago, so we're celebrating her centenary.
segments.translation: 男士：是的。她正好在100年前生于 Kenton，所以我们会庆祝她的百年诞辰。

segments.text: WOMAN: I'm a biologist, so I've always been interested in her.
segments.translation: 女士：我是一个生物学家，所以我一直对她很感兴趣。

segments.text: I didn't realise she came from Kenton.
segments.translation: 不过我没意识到她来自 Kenton。

segments.text: MAN: Yes. Well, all that will take place in the afternoon, and later, as the sun sets, there'll be a firework display.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯。刚才说的所有节目都是在下午，随后，日落的时候将会有焰火表演。

segments.text: You should go to the park to watch, as you'll get the best view from there.
segments.translation: 你应该去公园看的，那儿有最好的视野。

segments.text: And the display takes place on the opposite side of the river.
segments.translation: 焰火表演就在河对面。

segments.text: It's always one of the most popular events in the festival.
segments.translation: 那一直是节日期间最受欢迎的活动之一。

segments.text: WOMAN: Sounds great.
segments.translation: 女士：听起来很赞。

segments.text: WOMAN: And what's happening on the other days?
segments.translation: 女士：其余那些天有什么节目呢？

segments.text: MAN: There are several events that go on the whole time.
segments.translation: 男士：节日期间有好几个活动。

segments.text: For example, the students of the art college have produced a number of videos, all connected with relationships between children and their grandparents.
segments.translation: 比如说，艺术学院的学生制作了很多视频， 都是关于祖孙关系的。

segments.text: WOMAN: That sounds interesting.
segments.translation: 女士：这听起来挺有趣的。

segments.text: It makes a change from children and parents, doesn't it!
segments.translation: 同以前探讨父母与子女关系的不一样。

segments.text: MAN: Exactly. Because the art college is in use for classes, throughout the festival, the videos are being shown in Handsworth House.
segments.translation: 男士：是的。因为艺术学院在节日期间要上课，所以视频是在 Handsworth House 放映的。

segments.text: WOMAN: How do you spell the name?
segments.translation: 女士：那个名字怎么拼？

segments.text: MAN: H-A-N-D-S-W-O-R-T-H. Handsworth House. It's close to the Town Hall.
segments.translation: 男士：拼写为H-A-N-D-S-W-O-R-T-H。Handsworth House。就在市政厅附近。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。

segments.text: MAN: Now let me see, what else can I tell you about?
segments.translation: 男士：我想想看，还有别的什么能告诉您的？

segments.text: WOMAN: Are there any displays of ballet dancing?
segments.translation: 女士：有芭蕾舞表演吗？

segments.text: I'm particularly interested in that as I do it as a hobby.
segments.translation: 我对芭蕾尤其感兴趣，我自己也跳，当是爱好。

segments.text: MAN: There isn't any ballet, I'm afraid, but there'll be a demonstration of traditional dances from all round the country.
segments.translation: 男士：恐怕没有芭蕾表演，但是有全国各地的传统舞蹈的汇演。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, that'd be nice. Where's that being held?
segments.translation: 女士：啊，太棒了。那在哪举行呢？

segments.text: MAN: It's in the market in the town centre - the outdoor one, not the covered market.
segments.translation: 男士：在市中心的市场里——室外的那个，不是室内的。

segments.text: And it's on at 2 and 5 every afternoon of the festival, apart from the first day.
segments.translation: 除了第一天，节日期间的每天下午两点和五点开始。

segments.text: WOMAN: Lovely. I'm interested in all kinds of dancing, so I'm sure I'll enjoy that!
segments.translation: 女士：太棒了！我对所有种类的舞蹈都感兴趣，我确信我会很享受那些表演的。

segments.text: MAN: Mmm. I'm sure you will.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，我确信你会的。

segments.text: WOMAN: And I'd really like to go to some concerts, if there are any.
segments.translation: 女士：如果有音乐会的话，我也很想去看看。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, there are several.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，有的，有好几个。

segments.text: Three performed by professionals, and one by local children.
segments.translation: 有三个是职业乐手的表演，还有一个是本地儿童的表演。

segments.text: WOMAN: And where is it being held?
segments.translation: 女士：那在哪举行的呢？

segments.text: MAN: It's in the library, which is in Park Street.
segments.translation: 男士：在公园街的图书馆举行。

segments.text: On the 18th, at 6.30 in the evening.18
WOMAN: I presume I'll need tickets for that.
segments.translation: 女士：我想我应该要买票。

segments.text: MAN: Yes. You can book online, or you can buy them when you arrive in Kenton.
segments.translation: 男士：是的。您可以在网上订，或者在您到Kenton的时候在节假日售票处买。

segments.text: Either at the festival box office, or from any shops displaying our logo in the windows.
segments.translation: 或是任何窗口带有我们商标的商店买都行。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well. I think that'll keep me busy for the whole of my stay in Kenton.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。我想我在Kenton的那些天都会很忙了。

segments.text: Thank you so much for all your help.
segments.translation: 非常感谢你的帮助。

segments.text: MAN: You're welcome.
segments.translation: 男士：不客气。

segments.text: I hope you enjoy your stay.
segments.translation: 希望您能享受在Kenton的时光。

segments.text: WOMAN: Thank you. Goodbye.
segments.translation: 女士：谢谢。再见。
